testcase.name: checkImageGenRateLimit — 10th call (boundary OK) > count=10 → no throw (AC-7.2 boundary)
checkImageGenRateLimit — 11th call > count=11 → TOO_MANY_REQUESTS with correct message (AC-7.3 · AC-2)
checkImageGenRateLimit — 11th call > boundary: count=10 passes, count=11 rejects (AC-8)
checkImageGenRateLimit — cross-account isolation > accountId=1 count=10 不影响 accountId=2 count=0 (AC-7.4 · SHIELD REJ-008)
checkImageGenRateLimit — cross-account isolation > 1000 accounts each have independent keys (AC-10 performance)
checkImageGenRateLimit — day rollover > UTC date change resets count to 0 for new day (AC-7.5)
getImageGenDailyUsage — read-only count > returns count=0 when key not set (AC-4)
getImageGenDailyUsage — read-only count > returns current count from Redis (AC-4)
